query_title: Scooby-Doo! & Batman: The Brave and the Bold

recommendations.title: Batman vs Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
recommendations.genres: Animation, Science Fiction, Adventure, Crime, Comedy, Action
recommendations.overview: Batman, Batgirl, and Robin forge an alliance with the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles to fight against the Turtles' sworn enemy, The Shredder, who has apparently teamed up with Ra's Al Ghul and The League of Assassins.

recommendations.title: The Death of Superman
recommendations.genres: Science Fiction, Animation, Action, Drama, Fantasy
recommendations.overview: When a hulking monster arrives on Earth and begins a mindless rampage, the Justice League is quickly called in to stop it. But it soon becomes apparent that only Superman can stand against the monstrosity.

recommendations.title: The Death and Return of Superman
recommendations.genres: Science Fiction, Adventure, Animation, Action, Fantasy
recommendations.overview: The Death of Superman and Reign of the Supermen now presented as an over two-hour unabridged and seamless animated feature. Witness the no-holds-barred battle between the Justice League and an unstoppable alien force known only as Doomsday, a battle

recommendations.title: Scooby-Doo Meets Batman
recommendations.overview: Scooby-Doo Meets Batman is a video compilation from Warner Bros. Home Entertainment. It consists of two episodes from Hanna-Barbera's The New Scooby-Doo Movies, "The Dynamic Scooby Doo Affair" and "The Caped Crusader Caper", where Scooby-Doo and the

recommendations.title: Scooby-Doo! Adventures: The Mystery Map
recommendations.overview: When Shaggy and Scooby find a mysterious pirate's treasure map in their triple-extra-large Scooby snack pizza, the whole Mystery Inc. gang sets out from their treehouse to find the lost booty of Gnarlybeard and the Phantom Parrot, encountering some s

recommendations.title: Reign of the Supermen
recommendations.genres: Science Fiction, Animation, Action, Fantasy, Drama
recommendations.overview: In the wake of The Death of Superman, the world is still mourning the loss of the Man of Steel following his fatal battle with the monster Doomsday. However, no sooner as his body been laid to rest than do four new bearers of the Superman shield come

recommendations.title: Scooby-Doo! Pirates Ahoy!
recommendations.genres: Fantasy, Animation, Comedy, Family, Mystery, Adventure
recommendations.overview: It's horror on the high seas when Scooby-Doo and the gang take a creepy cruise into one of the world's most mysterious places, the Bermuda Triangle! If Scooby, Shaggy and the gang can't solve this mystery, they may have to walk the plank.

recommendations.title: Scooby-Doo and the Alien Invaders
recommendations.genres: Animation, Family, Comedy, Mystery, Science Fiction
recommendations.overview: A cosmic case of flying saucers, intergalactic intrigue and out-of-this-world romance launches Scooby-Doo! and the Mystery Inc., Gang into their most unearthly adventure ever.

recommendations.title: Happy Halloween, Scooby-Doo!
recommendations.overview: Scooby-Doo and the gang team up with their pals, Bill Nye The Science Guy and Elvira Mistress of the Dark, to solve this mystery of gigantic proportions and save Crystal Cove!

recommendations.title: Scooby-Doo! and the Legend of the Vampire
recommendations.genres: Family, Animation, Comedy, Fantasy, Music, Mystery
recommendations.overview: The Yowie Yahoo starts kidnapping musicians at a concert attended by Scooby and the gang in Vampire Rock, Australia.
